description: CompositionRed sleeveless kurta made of 100% cotton, has a square neck with panel strips along the neckline and the sleeves and has diagonal print in white and redFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang in the form of this printed kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in this diagonal print, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day.
